citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: ... Provide a dedicated member of staff to provide information and to answer any related queries, or signpost you to a person or service to help you further
ENSA Advice ... can offer the following: Advice on how to find accommodation ... Look over leases and tenancy agreements ... Advice on tenant rights and responsibilities
Please contact privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk with your enquiries.
Please contact ENSA Advice on 0131 229 8791 to arrange an appointment or email ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk

findings.text: The brochure describes a private accommodation support service and ENSA Advice, including contact details and types of assistance offered.
No evidence in the provided materials that the brochure was provided to Anfal.
No evidence in the provided materials that Anfal accessed the accommodation support service or ENSA Advice.
The task cannot be completed with the single source provided; additional records (emails, service logs, correspondence) are needed.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Evidence Gap: Brochure Provision and Service Access

**Source Reviewed:** NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025)

**What the brochure contains:**
- Description of the Private Accommodation Support Service (contact: privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk)
- Description of ENSA Advice (phone: 0131 229 8791, email: ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk)
- General guidance on finding flats, tenant rights, and disputes

**What is missing:**
- No record that this brochure was provided to Anfal (no delivery receipt, email, or acknowledgment)
- No record that Anfal contacted either support service (no emails, call logs, or appointment records)

**Impact:**
- Cannot verify whether Anfal had notice of available support
- Cannot verify whether Anfal attempted to mitigate arrears by seeking advice

**Recommendation:** Search for correspondence, service logs, or other records showing provision or access.
proposed_artifacts.title: Evidence Gap: Brochure Provision and Service Access

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search available correspondence (emails, letters, messages) and service logs (accommodation support, ENSA Advice) for any record that the Private Accommodation Brochure 2025 was provided to Anfal or that she accessed the support services described in the brochure. Report any findings or confirm absence.
proposed_tasks.title: Search for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal

risk_flags.description: Cannot confirm brochure was provided to Anfal; may affect claims about notice or opportunity to seek support.
Cannot confirm Anfal accessed support services; may affect mitigation or duty-to-mitigate arguments.

summary: The brochure (NAP-SRC-0014) describes support services but contains no evidence it was provided to Anfal or that she accessed those services. No records of provision or access exist in the provided materials. A follow-up task is proposed to search for correspondence or service records.

uncertainties.reason: No source in the work order shows delivery or receipt of the brochure by Anfal.
No source in the work order shows that Anfal contacted or used the support services listed in the brochure.
